title: When AI does the work, who does the learning?
summary_en: AI is rapidly reshaping education, but not always in ways that support learning. A growing number of AI tools promise to “help” students by doing assignments, writing papers, solving problem sets, or even completing exams automatically.
title_cn: 教育领域人工智能应用相关学习成效及数据安全问题引发广泛讨论

title: How well can your institution recover from a ransomware attack?
summary_en: Most educational institutions believe they’re prepared for a cyberattack. Perhaps they’re running backups, and an incident response plan exists somewhere on the shared drive. Maybe they have a cyber insurance policy in place, or have run a tabletop exercise or two.
title_cn: 全球教育机构勒索软件攻击风险上升 恢复能力建设亟待加强
